coupon.source_phrase_block: Pass entitles bearer to free parking for one vehicle (excluding buses or vans). Please visit the Massachusetts State Parks online (https://www.mass.gov/guides/visiting-massachusetts-state-parks-guide) to learn all the locations that you can use this parking pass. This is a circulating pass that must be checked out and returned to the library. Instructions will be emailed to you upon reservation.
